text: Here is my plan. Tuesday board meeting is the window. Both boards will be present for the quarterly review.
You need a working demo that shows clear business value. Revenue projections, client interest, the works.
We can have the demo ready. The core platform works. We just need to polish the presentation layer.
Angela can get us on the agenda. She will frame it as a strategic technology review.
Good. And get Benvolio on board. You will need infrastructure support.
